name: Consignee Wise Tender
query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN LENGTH(consignee_name) > 15 
    THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(consignee_name, 1, 15), '...') 
    ELSE consignee_name 
  END as "Consignee",
  COUNT(name) as "Total Tenders"
FROM `tabTender`
GROUP BY consignee_name
ORDER BY COUNT(name) DESC
